prompt: Create a retro vintage, grainy but bright fashion portrait of a young woman standing indoors beside a marble vanity in warm sunlight. The subject has dark brown long hair styled in a thick loose side braid over one shoulder, with small white and pink flowers tucked throughout the braid and a few soft tendrils framing the face. Her face should be softly obscured or anonymized while preserving a natural portrait pose. She wears a beautifully tailored modest Pakistani Islamic summer dress: cream or ivory fabric with a tiny all-over floral print, square neckline, fitted long sleeves, fitted bodice, gathered waist, and a full flowing ankle-length skirt with visible pleats and soft movement. She rests one hand on the marble counter and holds the other gently near her waist. The setting is an elegant dressing room or boutique interior with a cream textured wall, a tall mirror in the background, and a white-gray marble vanity with brass knobs. On the vanity, include exactly 4 visible decorative items: 3 small perfume bottles with gold caps and amber-pink liquid, and 1 ornate gold tray holding them. Use warm natural sunlight from the right, soft shadows, shallow depth of field, muted beige and cream tones, realistic fabric texture, nostalgic film grain, slightly faded highlights, and a bright vintage editorial look. No text, no watermark, no modern streetwear, no extra people.
